# Docs & Memory — Skill Group

Documentation maintenance and memory persistence skills.

## Routing

Read the skill file based on the argument:

| Input | Skill file | What it does |
|-------|-----------|--------------|
| `doc-maintainer` or `docs` | `skills/doc-maintainer.md` | Auto-maintain documentation as code changes |
| `wiki` | `skills/wiki.md` | Wiki generation and maintenance |
| `remember` | `skills/remember.md` | Persist decisions and context across sessions |
| `writer-memory` or `writing` | `skills/writer-memory.md` | Writing style memory and consistency |

Read the matched skill file and execute its workflow.
